title: Craftable Totem
description: Makes the Totem Craftable, but balanced
body:
**Craftable Totems is a simple yet useful mod that allows you to finally craft Totems of Undying!
Perfect for survival players who enjoy a challenge but still want a second chance.**

🔹 Crafting recipe using rare materials  
🔹 Great for hardcore and adventure worlds  
🔹 Compatible with other mods

**Get your immortality – the fair way!**
